subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My Glory and My mercy! The letters addressed in the name of Javád - upon him be My Glory - were presented before Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی و رحمتی مراسلاتیکه باسم جواد علیه بهائی بودند عبد حاضر
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
